title: Freedom of Information (FoI) responses from the Planning Inspectorate in 2022
body: "The Freedom of Information Act gives people the right to ask any public sector organisation for all the recorded information they have on any subject.  This page contains responses to Freedom of Information requests submitted to the Planning Inspectorate that are related to statistics in 2022.  Freedom of Information (FoI) responses from the Planning Inspectorate in 2023 - GOV.UK  Freedom of Information (FoI) responses from the Planning Inspectorate in 2024 - GOV.UK   Freedom of Information (FoI) responses from the Planning Inspectorate in 2025 - GOV.UK  "
